idea-plugin.name: Open in Obsidian
idea-plugin.description:
Open the current file's matching Obsidian note with one click.

If your project root contains an .obsidian folder, it is treated as an Obsidian vault. The toolbar button finds the .md file in the vault whose name matches the file currently open in the editor and opens it in Obsidian. If no matching note is found, opens the vault instead.

The button is disabled when the current project is not an Obsidian vault or no file is open in the editor. Also available via Find Action (⌘⇧A / Ctrl+Shift+A).

action.description: Open matching note in Obsidian, or vault if no note found
